changes.productTitle: Helix Sleep Elite Collection Twilight Elite Luxury Firm 15" Mattress

before.description: Meet The Helix Twilight Elite the ultimate investment in better sleep for side-sleepers who love a firm mattress with top-of-the-line comfort. Designed for better sleep with with extra contouring to the hips and shoulders for best-in-class support for side-sleepers. Advanced lumbar support — the ErgoAlign Contour Layer helps alleviate tightness and discomfort. Innovative GlacioTex Cooling Cover feels instantly cool when you get into bed, for that crisp-sheets feeling. Peaceful nights for you and your partner thanks to a microcoil comfort layer that erases any shifts or stirrings. A deeply comfortable, restorative rest with our house-designed SupremeSupport 7.0 Memory Foam for 7x the tension-relieving comfort. Guaranteed to feel perfect,  if you’re not completely satisfied, we’ll help calibrate it with comfort inserts or a seamless exchange. Medium Firm feel: Naturally responsive with little contouring Luxuriously supportive and pressure-relieving Softer under the shoulders to relieve pressure & firmer under the hips for lumbar support Best for: Side sleepers Side sleepers People with lower back pain Anyone who loves a bed with little give and a lot of support Designed and Assembled In Our Arizona Factory Don’t settle for a mattress made overseas with low quality and questionable materials. At Helix, we make our own foam, roll our own coils, and hand-assemble every mattress to ensure the highest quality. The ultimate investment in your sleep, designed to deliver exceptional comfort, advanced cooling, and unparalleled support for years to come. Backed by a Limited Lifetime Warranty.

after.title: Helix Sleep Elite Collection Twilight Elite Luxury Firm 15" Mattress in Los Angeles
